articles.author: Martin Goillandeau, Elizabeth Wolfe, Dianne Gallagher
articles.title: Daughter of American woman missing in the Bahamas sheds new light on couple’s marriage - CNN
articles.description: As investigators seek answers in the disappearance of an American woman in the Bahamas whose husband says fell overboard while riding in a dinghy, her family is sharing insight into the couple’s relationship and trying to make sense of what happened.
